creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 2/9/09, Garrett Cooper <yanefbsd@gmail.com> wrote:
> Hi Fernando,
>    Have you tried an 8-CURRENT disk yet? There were changes made by
> rnoland@ which improved DRM support (and general driver support I
> believe) with ATI cards.

Not yet. But I'm a bit scared of doing it :)
This was working before. Can you confirm any changes in ATI drivers
support in the last couple of months?

Cheers

> Cheers,
> -Garrett
>
